name: daily-price
description: Scrape each clinic's prices, validate them, and write the day's snapshot. A real-world loop: one checked sub-sequence per clinic, a failed clinic retries on its own without touching the others.

steps.instruction:
List the active clinics in {region} that have a public website. For each,
capture {name, url, id}. This is the loop input.
steps.title: Pick Clinics

steps.instruction:
Find {clinic}'s price page — try the sitemap first, then the nav — and
extract the treatment prices verbatim with currency.
steps.title: Find Prices

steps.instruction: Sanity-check {clinic}'s prices — no zeros, plausible ranges.
steps.title: Validate Prices

steps.instruction: Roll the per-clinic snapshots into the day's report, flagging anomalies.
steps.title: Summarize
